name: Roasted Eggplant with Chilies
recipeInstructions:
1. Grill or broil whole eggplants until they collapse.
2. When cool enough to handle, slit them open and scoop out the flesh into a skillet with the oil.
3. Add the onion and cook over medium heat for 10 minutes, stirring frequently to prevent scorching.
4. Stir in all remaining ingredients except the coriander, then cook, stirring often for 10 to 15 minutes.
5. Take care not to let it burn.
6. Stir in the coriander and serve.
